description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On September 24, 2025 at 12:57 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Bundy Drive near W. Olympic Boulevard.  
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing northwest in the second from the right lane on Bundy Drive in a queue of traffic for a red light at the 
intersection with W. Olympic Boulevard. While the Waymo AV was stopped, a passenger car that was initially stopped behind the Waymo 
AV proceeded forward and the front of the passenger car made contact with the rear of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, 
the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode, and a test driver was present (in the driver’s seating position). The 
passenger car sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
